page_metadata.biotools__summary: A method that simultaneously identifies and optimizes hit/lead molecules by integrating chemical- and protein-space-driven architectures and stands for an automated-hit identification and optimization tool (A-HIOT).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A method that simultaneously identifies and optimizes hit/lead molecules by integrating chemical- and protein-space-driven architectures and stands for an automated-hit identification and optimization tool (A-HIOT).
